Pneumonanthe acaulis is native to Europe and is often found growing in wet environments. This plant is also known for its distinctive, urn-shaped flowers.

intro: Pneumonanthe acaulis, also known as Lungwort, is a perennial flowering plant of the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to Europe. The health benefits of Lungwort include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia, as well as digestive problems and skin conditions.
